dsl_rule.translation_notes: Double Top reversal pattern with downside breakout. Entry when price breaks below support zone (approximated using pivot support s1) with volume confirmation. Support zone identified from prior price action (represented by pivot levels). Exit on support zone reclaim (throwback/pullback). Success rate for bearish outcome is 72% with average decline of 19%. Pattern is context-dependent but applicable in any regime.

source_rule_text: Double Tops (Eve & Adam): Support zone identification below chart pattern; support forms from prior price action and congestion zones that halt price declines and create entry conditions
